---
name: Feature request / font support
about: Suggest an improvement, or ask for another legacy font to be supported
title: "[Request] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature, or the font you'd like supported.

**Why?**
What problem does it solve for you?

**For a new font:** its name, and (if you can) a small sample of text in it.

> Note: some things are deliberately out of scope for now (Excel/PowerPoint,
> reverse Unicode→Bijoy, grammar checking). See `docs/KNOWN-LIMITATIONS.md`.
